depression.description: I often feel like I'm not doing enough to manage my life. Every time I face a challenge, it reinforces my belief that I'm incompetent and a failure.
I feel ashamed when I think about asking my parents for help. It makes me feel like I'm not living up to my own expectations of being independent.
Whenever I receive bills or financial statements, I get overwhelmed with anxiety. I worry that I'm not capable of handling my finances properly.
I constantly compare myself to my brother and feel pressure to be more independent. I don't want to end up like him, relying on our parents.
When I make a mistake, like mismanaging my budget, I can't help but criticize myself harshly. It feels like proof that I'm failing at being an adult.
